formDescription: This section collects details for other land that is physically affected by the project works. The details to be collected include the land owner's name, civic address, and legal description of the property, boundaries, and certificate of title (if a private or crown land is affected). Fields adapt dynamically based on the selected category of land ownership.

LandOwnershipCategory.title: What is the category of land ownership?
LandOwnershipCategory.description: Classification of the land being described (Private, Provincial Crown, or Other).

LandOwnerAffected.title: Name of owner of land that is affected by your works:
LandOwnerAffected.description: Full legal name of the individual or entity that owns the affected land parcel.

CivicAddressOther.title: Civic address or other location description of affected land:
CivicAddressOther.description: The street address, physical description, or general location of the affected property.

LegalDescription.title: Legal Description:
LegalDescription.description: The formal legal description of the property as recorded in the Land Title system. The legal description of land can be found on the property tax notice.

MetesAndBounds.title: Metes and Bounds (description of unsurveyed land):
MetesAndBounds.description: A technical description of the boundaries for land that has not been formally surveyed.

CertificateOfTitleNo.title: Certificate of Title No:
CertificateOfTitleNo.description: The registration number of the Certificate of Title for the affected property.
